sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, text_string VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, text_string) VALUES (1, 'DuckDB Database');
UPDATE test_strings SET text_string = substr(text_string, 1, 4) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, substr(text_string, 5, 7) AS extracted FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, text_string) VALUES (2, 'Fuzz Testing');
